summary: Iteration 20: Currency Localization, Referral Earnings Display, Admin Referral Reward Config - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: All Invite & Earn, Wallet, Marketplace, Admin Billing features verified.

issues: Minor 404 errors for static resources - non-critical

critical_code_review_comments: Currency detection endpoint correctly returns country_code, currency_code, currency_symbol, rate_to_usd
Exchange rates endpoint returns USD-base rates from open.er-api.com
Referral reward amount endpoint returns configured amount (default $5.00)
Guardian my-referrals endpoint returns referrals array, total_earned, total_count
Admin Billing/ROI tab has Referral Reward field with 'USD - wallet credit' label
CurrencyProvider wraps app and provides formatAmount function
Toggle buttons (Spellcheck, Phonetic, Brand Stories) work correctly with green=ON, red=OFF colors
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features verified: (1) Currency Detection - Returns USD for US-based server, formatAmount() available via CurrencyProvider. (2) Referral Earnings - Invite & Earn tab shows referral code (REF-EC8CYH), copy buttons, total earned ($0.00), referral count (0), referral history. (3) Admin Referral Reward - Billing/ROI tab has 'REFERRAL REWARD (USD - WALLET CREDIT)' field set to $5.00. Toggle buttons (Spellcheck ON/OFF, Phonetic ON/OFF, Brand Stories ON/OFF) work correctly in parent portal Students tab with proper color coding (emerald=ON, rose=OFF).
